title: Lunch Box Notes For Husband/Boyfriend, Adult Romantic Cards, Pack of 36, Assorted Love Designs, Fun Lunch Notes (Love Theme For Adults)
features: ✅ Care For Your Wellfare: We all need some kind of inspiration and motivation to get up and start our day on a positive note. Change your mindset and the way you view the world with the help of our motivational quotes set. Each card is unique and features large fonts and a beautiful design. The features of this card include multicolor, light weighted, rectangular, assorted, printed with quotes and blanks.
✅ Includes: 1 Pack of 36 Cards (double sided) with the Note card Size: (L x W) – 3.5 x 2.5 inches (Approx)

✅ Premium Quality: Our Lunch note cards are professionally printed on 300 gsm thick high quality matte cardstock, makes them easy to write on if you want to leave an extra special note to your card. Your child will surely love them!
✅ Features: multicolor, light weighted, rectangular, assorted, printed with quotes.

✅ Each card is unique: Special notes on every card induce positive energy in their minds. A perfect fit for your teens or adults. The cards are double sided so you have a space for your own bible message! Your loved ones will love receiving a special note just for them in their lunchbox.

✅ Tags: Mindfulness Gifts for Kids, Teens, Men & Women, lunch box notes for teens, lunch box notes for adults blank, lunch notes for adults/ teens, lunch notes for boyfriend/ husband/ mom, inspirational note cards, positive affirmation encouragement cards.
